data.name: Doug Fessler
data.headline: Software Engineer
data.objective: To continue growing and learning while creating fun and engaging digital experiences using the skills and strong work ethic that I've developed throughout my career.

teams.name: Framework Team
bullets: Designed and implemented features for UI Framework built in Unity using C# making it easier to build 3D perspective UI.
Optimized UI Framework to run more efficiently.
Helped to implement Lua scripting framework on the server using C++.
Provide guidance around Lua and UI Frameworks to designers and engineers across the team.

teams.name: Features Team
bullets: Refactored hero picker to allow for implementing heroes through data.
Implemented design for The Dalaran Heist and Tombs of Terror solo adventures.

projects.name: Unannounced Project
bullets: Added traversal system for jumping, climbing, and sliding with tools for designers to mark appropriate areas in the editor.
Added system for players to perform multiplayer sync moves with different effects based on player's class and position.
Integrated UE4's attribute system, updated it to support pulling data from a local or remote source, and added caching for quick updates.
Integrated gameplay features and UI for spectator interaction from a separate mobile application.

projects.name: StarBlood Arena
bullets: Improved custom AI navigation generation, added difficulty levels, improved basic AI combat, and added AI for capture the flag game mode.
Set up framework for sending match configurations to matchmaking service and refactored team system to support data from matchmaking.
Implemented single player and cooperative game modes. Optimized wave defense game mode by implementing a pool manager.

projects.name: Embers of War
bullets: Audited existing code base and retrofitted support for multiplayer.
Implemented a loadout system built around UE4's gameplay abilities and attributes.
Laid ground work for a proper build process in order to make builds more readily available.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Developed platform C++ SDK and Unreal Engine 4 SDK.
Created platform integration examples in Unreal Engine 4.
Integrated Coherent UI and Coherent UIGT into Unreal Engine 4.
Developed playable game prototypes used in sales pitches and demonstrations.
Designed and built software around platform's RESTful APIs.

projects.name: Ghostbusters 2016
bullets: Modified engine to use dialog audio based on culture settings.
Improved AI by adding a box volume to allow restricting AI movement to an area.

additional_experience.title: Web Developer
bullets: Full stack responsive site estimates and build outs.
Updated sites with new content, creating new graphics, layout designs, and animations.

additional_experience.title: Web Developer
bullets: Full stack development and maintenance on all company websites.
Maintain company LAN, servers, and other computer systems support.

data.interests: Software Engineering, Game Development, Web Development, Gaming, and Computer Hardware. Favorite games: Super Smash Bros., Metal Gear Solid, Final Fantasy, Dark Souls, Hearthstone, World of Warcraft, Overwatch.
